rows.label: qev085304_MSG0002
rows.name:
With this much, we won't
be troubled for a while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085304_MSG0003
rows.name:
Aren't you listening to your old
man's orders a bit too obediently?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085304_MSG0004
rows.name: My old man? Have you met my old man before?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085304_MSG0006
rows.name: My old man died a long time ago.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085304_MSG0008
rows.name: Th-then was that person a ghost?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085304_MSG0009
rows.name: What is the meaning of this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085304_MSG0010
rows.name:
I don't know. More importantly, I can't
stand being attacked by native creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085304_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm heading back to NLA to meet
up with Kias. Let's go quickly.[ST:wait ]
